tasks.subject: Task 1: Session types & action enum
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ReviewSession/SessionParticipant types and the three session.* events to the DocEvent union, plus the SESSION_ACTIONS value-set.

**Files:**
- Modify: lib/events.ts
- Modify: lib/enums.ts
- Test: tests/unit/enums.session.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ReviewSession + SessionParticipant exported from lib/events.ts
- DocEvent includes session.started/updated/ended
- SESSION_ACTIONS = [start,join,leave,end] + SessionAction exported
- tsc --noEmit clean

**Verify:** CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/enums.session.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/events.ts", "lib/enums.ts", "tests/unit/enums.session.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/enums.session.test.ts && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ReviewSession+SessionParticipant exported", "DocEvent includes session.* events", "SESSION_ACTIONS + SessionAction exported", "tsc clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Review-session registry & leader-drop sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement lib/review-session.ts — in-memory session registry with start/join/leave/end lifecycle and the leader-drop / participant-prune sweep that reads presence.roster().

**Files:**
- Create: lib/review-session.ts
- Test: tests/unit/review-session.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- startSession auto-joins leader + emits session.started; second start null, no event
- joinSession appends + emits session.updated; repeat idempotent
- non-leader leaveSession emits session.updated; leader leaveSession ends
- endSession non-leader false/no event; leader true + session.ended
- evictStaleSessions ends on absent leader; prunes departed participants
- getSession snapshot/null

**Verify:** CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/review-session.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/review-session.ts", "tests/unit/review-session.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/review-session.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["startSession + one-at-a-time", "joinSession idempotent", "leave/end semantics", "evictStaleSessions sweep", "getSession"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Session action route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement POST /api/documents/[id]/session dispatching start/join/leave/end with auth, participant, and conflict handling.

**Files:**
- Create: app/api/documents/[id]/session/route.ts
- Test: tests/unit/session.route.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 401/404/400 guards
- start 200/409; join 200/409; leave 204; end 204 leader / 403 non-leader
- name resolves name.trim() || email || Someone

**Verify:** CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/session.route.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/session/route.ts", "tests/unit/session.route.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/session.route.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["401/404/400", "start 200/409", "join 200/409", "leave 204", "end 204/403", "name fallback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Replay active session on SSE connect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When a client connects to the document stream and a session is active, immediately send a session.started snapshot.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/api/documents/[id]/stream/route.ts
- Test: tests/unit/stream.session-sync.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- active session replayed as session.started on connect
- no session.started when none active

**Verify:** CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/stream.session-sync.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/documents/[id]/stream/route.ts", "tests/unit/stream.session-sync.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/stream.session-sync.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["replay on connect", "no replay when none active"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Client session reducer & predicates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement lib/session-client.ts — a pure reducer and predicates the React layer uses to track session state.

**Files:**
- Create: lib/session-client.ts
- Test: tests/unit/session-client.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- applySessionEvent started/updated/ended/unrelated
- isLeader / isInSession / canStart

**Verify:** CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/session-client.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/session-client.ts", "tests/unit/session-client.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true npx vitest run tests/unit/session-client.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["applySessionEvent", "isLeader", "isInSession", "canStart"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SessionBanner component & DocumentView wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Render the session UI in the document header and wire DocumentView to track session state from the SSE stream and POST lifecycle actions — no new EventSource.

**Files:**
- Create: components/SessionBanner.tsx
- Modify: components/DocumentView.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- four banner states with testids (start/join/leave/end-session, session-banner, session-leader-name, session-participant-count)
- buttons POST action + disable in flight
- SSE switch updates session state on session.started/updated/ended
- tsc + lint clean

**Verify:** npx tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/SessionBanner.tsx", "components/DocumentView.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && CI=true pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["four banner states", "buttons POST + disable", "SSE switch", "tsc + lint clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: E2E lifecycle test & full verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the full lifecycle across two browser contexts, confirm the no-third-EventSource invariant, then run the complete verification suite.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/e2e/sessions.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- start/join/end lifecycle across two contexts
- exactly 2 EventSources in A's tab
- leader-drop auto-end clears B's banner
- test:unit + test:e2e + lint all pass

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:e2e -- sessions; then CI=true pnpm test:unit && CI=true pnpm test:e2e && CI=true pnpm lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/sessions.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "lsof -ti:3000 | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null; CI=true pnpm test:unit && CI=true pnpm test:e2e && CI=true pnpm lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lifecycle two contexts", "2 EventSources", "leader-drop auto-end", "full suite passes"]}
```
